'''Gartros''' were small dragon-like [[Bird/Legends|avian]] creatures that lived on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. They had spiked tails, and jaws filled with sharp teeth.<ref name="CSWE" />

The eggs of the gartro were served as a delicacy at [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]]<ref name="CSWE" /> alongside [[Nerf steak/Legends|nerf steak]], [[protato wedge]]s, and [[Quor'sav-fried steak]].<ref name="Dex">{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/dexdiner/index.html|text=Dining at Dex's|int=Dining at Dex's}}</ref> They were also served pickled,<ref name="CSWE" /> for 3.7 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for three, or as a [[gartro egg omelet]].<ref name="Dex" />
